resources:
mdm
MIGfMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBAQUAA4GNADCBiQKBgQDN4SRt3ktsz4m944msmZenI/AncR5tIoRiN9riMQ0SB0KBsApXIUDuZ+iT3/mAoSzaKmlAd2B4C4o86cIN8MDA9hoZ+nBl/Vm3gqTZksie45unwxRXxGoCX+LXqHhidrhtZQD++O7TtPT4f5VOp9Ury4D35bgdMHr0PBiuEQdSVwIDAQAB  http://10.171.166.70/api/ http://192.168.1.187:9999/mdmApi/s "Current status:" "Current status:" "Current status:" Disabled Enabled Kept active Not kept active Disable Wi-Fi Enable Wi-Fi Keep active Cancel keep-active Allow screenshots Deny screenshots Enable data connection App not activated Permission required for this operation. Supported only in EMUI 11/HarmonyOS 2.0 or later. Some app functions will be unavailable if you deactivate the device manager. Continue anyway? AGREE CANCEL I have read and agree Don\'t show again Disclaimer and Software License Agreement Permissions Notice By touching AGREE, you indicate that you have read and agree to the Disclaimer and Software License Agreement. Select a method for activating the device manager. User confirmed activation: This is the more common method. After the user confirms activation, they can deactivate it again at any time. Forced activation: This is only available for enterprise customized devices (devices purchased through the enterprise customization service in Vmall). The user can only activate the device manager, and cannot deactivate it. Delayed deactivation: A time period is specified (1 to 72 hours), and the time period starts after a successful activation. The device manager cannot be deactivated again until after the time period is up. User Confirmed Activation Forced Activation Delayed Deactivation Enter time period 1–72 (hours) setForcedActiveDeviceAdmin error setDelayDeactiveDeviceAdmin error Activate Device Manager Activate Return code: Description: Activate License Deactivate License Device administrator deactivated. Activate Activate Device Administrator Deactivate Device Manager No permission Active Inactive License status: Device administrator status: Finish Activate both the license and device administrator before using the MDM capability.
